verses.text: Pasian aw, mite in kei hong tuancil ahih manin kei hong hehpih in. Sunthapai-in galte in kei hong sucip hi
Sunthapai-in ka galte in kei hong tuancil uh a, kiphatsakna tawh mi tampi in kei hong do hi
Kei ka lau ciangin nangmah ka hong muang hi
A thu ka phat Pasian' sungah, lunghihmawhna khat zong nei hetloin Pasian ka muang hi. Mihing ahi lelte in kei, bang hong cihzo ding ahi hiam
Amaute in ka vai siatsak ding sunthapai-in hanciam uh a, amau' ngaihsutnate khempeuh keima siatna ding ahi hi
Amaute kikaikhawmin keimah hong buk uh a, ka gamtatna khempeuh hong encik uh hi. Amaute in keimah thah ding a hanciam uh bangin
amau' khialhna hangin amaute thuk in. Pasian aw, hehna tawh tua mite lawnkhiasuk in
Ka sin lin'nate khempeuh nangmah in na ciamteh khin hi. Ka khituite khempeuh na thawl sungah thun in. Tuate na laibu sungah kiciamteh hilo ahi hiam
Tua ciangin, keimah in kong koh ni peuh ciangin ka galte nungkik ding hi. Pasian pen keima-a' ahihna ka thei hi
A thu ka phat Pasian' sungah, a thu ka phat Topa' sungah
lunghihmawhna khat zong nei hetloin Pasian ka muang hi. Mihing lellelte in kei, bang hong cihzo ding ahi uh hiam
Pasian aw, nang tungah ka kiciamna ka zuih kul hi. Nangma tungah lungdamna kong thuk hi
Bang hang hiam cih leh sihna panin nong honkhia khin hi. Pasian' mai, nuntakna khuavak sungah ka pai theihna dingin ka khe a taalna ding panin na hong honkhia hi.
